title: Mirror subitem - any updates?

posts.author: stevesommerville (steve sommerville)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

i was wondering if there is any timeline for implementing mirror sub-items between boards. This topic was raised over 2 years ago, but still doesn’t seem to have been implemented.

It would be a really useful tool and unlock a lot of extra abilities in Monday, which would be very beneficial to everyone i think.

S
